revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:September 21 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of September 21 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦9月21日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[延宝]]元年（[[1673年]]_月_日） - 内裏炎上や洪水などにより延宝に改元 * [[文久]]3年（[[1863年]]_月_日） - 三河国加茂郡の農民が物価引下げを求めて一揆。初の「世直し一揆」 * [[文久]]3年（[[1863年]]_月_日） - [[土佐藩]]が、[[武市瑞山]]ら[[尊攘派]]を一斉に投獄 * [[明治]]5年（[[1872年]]_月_日） - [[川崎大師]]の縁日に際し日本初の[[臨時列車]]を運行<!-- 新橋～川崎間? -->
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月20日 (旧暦)|9月20日]] 翌日[[9月22日 (旧暦)|9月22日]] - 前月[[8月21日 (旧暦)|8月21日]] 翌月[[10月21日 (旧暦)|10月21日]] *新暦[[9月21日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 忌日 == * [[承応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1652年]][[10月23日]]） - [[別木庄左衛門]]、[[牢人]]（* 生年不明）

{{Lunar September}} '''Lunar September21日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[延宝]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1673年]][[10月30日]]） - 内裏炎上や洪水などにより[[寛文]]から延宝に改元 * [[嘉永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1854年]][[11月11日]]） - 幕府、オランダに蒸気軍艦2隻を発注（[[咸臨丸]]及び[[朝陽丸]]） * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[11月2日]]） - [[三河国]]加茂郡の農民が物価引下げを求めて[[一揆]]。初の「世直し一揆」 * 文久3年（グレゴリオ暦1863年11月2日） - [[土佐藩]]が、[[武市瑞山]]ら[[尊攘派]]を一斉に投獄 *<!-- [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[10月23日]]） - [[川崎大師]]の縁日に際し日本初の[[臨時列車]]を運行 10月21日か? -->
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1625年]][[10月22日]]） - [[吉川広家]]、[[周防国]][[岩国領]]初代領主（* [[1561年]]） * [[承応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1652年]][[10月23日]]） - [[別木庄左衛門]]、[[牢人]]（* 生年不明）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|20|9|22|8|21|10|9|0921}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunar September]]

{{Lunar September}} '''Lunar September21日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[延宝]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1673年]][[10月30日]]） - 内裏炎上や洪水などにより[[寛文]]から延宝に改元 * [[嘉永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1854年]][[11月11日]]） - 幕府、オランダに蒸気軍艦2隻を発注（[[咸臨丸]]及び[[朝陽丸]]） * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[11月2日]]） - [[三河国]]加茂郡の農民が物価引下げを求めて[[一揆]]。初の「世直し一揆」 * 文久3年（グレゴリオ暦1863年11月2日） - [[土佐藩]]が、[[武市瑞山]]ら[[尊攘派]]を一斉に投獄 *<!-- [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[10月23日]]） - [[川崎大師]]の縁日に際し日本初の[[臨時列車]]を運行 10月21日か? -->
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1625年]][[10月22日]]） - [[吉川広家]]、[[周防国]][[岩国領]]初代領主（* [[1561年]]） * [[承応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1652年]][[10月23日]]） - [[別木庄左衛門]]、[[牢人]]（* 生年不明）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|20|9|22|8|21|10|9|0921}}
[[Category:japanese Lunar Calendar]][[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunar September]]

revision.comment: idk what haoppened but removing and re-adding the template
Text replacement - "日'''は" to "--> is the Nth day of "
Moving from [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] to [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding boilerplate intro to all the days
Text replacement - "六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]" to "六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]][[Category:大安]]"
Text replacement - "旧暦}}" to "旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}"

revision.text:
'''September 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar September}} ''September 21'''<!--Lunar September21--> is the Nth day of [[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]][[Category:大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[延宝]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1673年]][[10月30日]]） - 内裏炎上や洪水などにより[[寛文]]から延宝に改元 * [[嘉永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1854年]][[11月11日]]） - 幕府、オランダに蒸気軍艦2隻を発注（[[咸臨丸]]及び[[朝陽丸]]） * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[11月2日]]） - [[三河国]]加茂郡の農民が物価引下げを求めて[[一揆]]。初の「世直し一揆」 * 文久3年（グレゴリオ暦1863年11月2日） - [[土佐藩]]が、[[武市瑞山]]ら[[尊攘派]]を一斉に投獄 *<!-- [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[10月23日]]） - [[川崎大師]]の縁日に際し日本初の[[臨時列車]]を運行 10月21日か? -->
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1625年]][[10月22日]]） - [[吉川広家]]、[[周防国]][[岩国領]]初代領主（* [[1561年]]） * [[承応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1652年]][[10月23日]]） - [[別木庄左衛門]]、[[牢人]]（* 生年不明）

{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:大安]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:September 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[Category:month category-September 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)-month category]]

{{Lunar September}} '''September 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
<!--== {{Lunar September}} ''September 21'''<!--Lunar September21 is the Nth day of [[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]][[Category:大安]]である。
--> == Events == * [[延宝]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1673年]][[10月30日]]） - 内裏炎上や洪水などにより[[寛文]]から延宝に改元 * [[嘉永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1854年]][[11月11日]]） - 幕府、オランダに蒸気軍艦2隻を発注（[[咸臨丸]]及び[[朝陽丸]]） * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[11月2日]]） - [[三河国]]加茂郡の農民が物価引下げを求めて[[一揆]]。初の「世直し一揆」 * 文久3年（グレゴリオ暦1863年11月2日） - [[土佐藩]]が、[[武市瑞山]]ら[[尊攘派]]を一斉に投獄 *<!-- [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[10月23日]]） - [[川崎大師]]の縁日に際し日本初の[[臨時列車]]を運行 10月21日か? -->
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[寛永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1625年]][[10月22日]]） - [[吉川広家]]、[[周防国]][[岩国領]]初代領主（* [[1561年]]） * [[承応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1652年]][[10月23日]]） - [[別木庄左衛門]]、[[牢人]]（* 生年不明）
== Commemorations ==

revision.text:
[[sn:September 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]] [[zh:九月廿一]] [[en:draft:September 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}}, [[1673]]) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏}}, floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from {{ill|Kanbun (Japan)|ja|寛文}} to {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}}. * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}}, [[1854]]) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府}} orders two steam-powered warships, {{ill|Kanrin Maru|ja|咸臨丸}} and {{ill|Chōyō Maru|ja|朝陽丸}}, from the {{ill|Kingdom of the Netherlands|ja|オランダ}}. * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}}, [[1863]]) – Farmers in {{ill|Kamo District, Aichi|ja|加茂郡}}, {{ill|Mikawa Province|ja|三河国}}, revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}}, [[1863]]) – The {{ill|Tosa Domain|ja|土佐藩}} arrests {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|ja|武市瑞山}} and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|尊攘派}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==

[[sn:September 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]] [[zh:九月廿一]] [[en:draft:September 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} , [[1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from {{ill|Kanbun (Japan)|ja|寛文}} to {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} . * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} , [[1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府}} orders two steam-powered warships, {{ill|Kanrin Maru|ja|咸臨丸}} and {{ill|Chōyō Maru|ja|朝陽丸}} , from the {{ill|Kingdom of the Netherlands|ja|オランダ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – Farmers in {{ill|Kamo District, Aichi|ja|加茂郡}} , {{ill|Mikawa Province|ja|三河国}} , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – The {{ill|Tosa Domain|ja|土佐藩}} arrests {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|ja|武市瑞山}} and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|尊攘派}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1625]] ) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|ja|吉川広家}} , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|周防国}} (b. [[1561]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|ja|承応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|20|9|22|8|21|10|9|0921}}

[[sn:September 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]] [[zh:九月廿一]] [[en:draft:September 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} , [[1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from {{ill|Kanbun (Japan)|ja|寛文}} to {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} . * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} , [[1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府}} orders two steam-powered warships, {{ill|Kanrin Maru|ja|咸臨丸}} and {{ill|Chōyō Maru|ja|朝陽丸}} , from the {{ill|Kingdom of the Netherlands|ja|オランダ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – Farmers in {{ill|Kamo District, Aichi|ja|加茂郡}} , {{ill|Mikawa Province|ja|三河国}} , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – The {{ill|Tosa Domain|ja|土佐藩}} arrests {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|ja|武市瑞山}} and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|尊攘派}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1625]] ) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|ja|吉川広家}} , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|周防国}} (b. [[1561]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|ja|承応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|20|9|22|8|21|10|9|0921}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|" to "{{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|"
revision.text:
[[sn:September 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]] [[zh:九月廿一]] [[en:draft:September 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} , [[1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from {{ill|Kanbun (Japan)|ja|寛文}} to {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} . * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} , [[1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府}} orders two steam-powered warships, {{ill|Kanrin Maru|ja|咸臨丸}} and {{ill|Chōyō Maru|ja|朝陽丸}} , from the {{ill|Kingdom of the Netherlands|ja|オランダ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – Farmers in {{ill|Kamo District, Aichi|ja|加茂郡}} , {{ill|Mikawa Province|ja|三河国}} , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – The {{ill|Tosa Domain|ja|土佐藩}} arrests {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|ja|武市瑞山}} and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|尊攘派}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1625]] ) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|ja|吉川広家}} , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|周防国}} (b. [[1561]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|ja|承応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|20|9|22|8|21|10|9|0921}}

revision.text:
[[sn:September 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]] [[zh:九月廿一]] [[en:draft:September 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} , [[1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from {{ill|Kanbun (Japan)|ja|寛文}} to {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} . * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} , [[1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府}} orders two steam-powered warships, {{ill|Kanrin Maru|ja|咸臨丸}} and {{ill|Chōyō Maru|ja|朝陽丸}} , from the {{ill|Kingdom of the Netherlands|ja|オランダ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – Farmers in {{ill|Kamo District, Aichi|ja|加茂郡}} , {{ill|Mikawa Province|ja|三河国}} , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – The {{ill|Tosa Domain|ja|土佐藩}} arrests {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|ja|武市瑞山}} and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|尊攘派}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1625]] ) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|ja|吉川広家}} , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|周防国}} (b. [[1561]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|ja|承応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|20|9|22|8|21|10|9|0921}}

== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1625]] ) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|ja|吉川広家}} , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|周防国}} (b. [[1561]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|ja|承応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).

[[sn:September 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]] [[zh:九月廿一]] [[en:draft:September 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} , [[1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from {{ill|Kanbun (Japan)|ja|寛文}} to {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} . * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} , [[1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府}} orders two steam-powered warships, {{ill|Kanrin Maru|ja|咸臨丸}} and {{ill|Chōyō Maru|ja|朝陽丸}} , from the {{ill|Kingdom of the Netherlands|ja|オランダ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – Farmers in {{ill|Kamo District, Aichi|ja|加茂郡}} , {{ill|Mikawa Province|ja|三河国}} , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – The {{ill|Tosa Domain|ja|土佐藩}} arrests {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|ja|武市瑞山}} and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1625]] ) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|ja|吉川広家}} , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province}} (b. [[1561]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|ja|承応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|20|9|22|8|21|10|9|0921}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "== See Also ==" to " == See Also! =="
revision.text:
[[sn:September 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]] [[zh:九月廿一]] [[en:draft:September 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} , [[1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from {{ill|Kanbun (Japan)|ja|寛文}} to {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} . * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} , [[1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府}} orders two steam-powered warships, {{ill|Kanrin Maru|ja|咸臨丸}} and {{ill|Chōyō Maru|ja|朝陽丸}} , from the {{ill|Kingdom of the Netherlands|ja|オランダ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – Farmers in {{ill|Kamo District, Aichi|ja|加茂郡}} , {{ill|Mikawa Province|ja|三河国}} , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – The {{ill|Tosa Domain|ja|土佐藩}} arrests {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|ja|武市瑞山}} and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1625]] ) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|ja|吉川広家}} , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province}} (b. [[1561]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|ja|承応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also! ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|20|9|22|8|21|10|9|0921}}

[[sn:September 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]] [[zh:九月廿一]] [[en:draft:September 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} , [[1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from {{ill|Kanbun (Japan)|ja|寛文}} to {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} . * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} , [[1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府}} orders two steam-powered warships, {{ill|Kanrin Maru|ja|咸臨丸}} and {{ill|Chōyō Maru|ja|朝陽丸}} , from the {{ill|Kingdom of the Netherlands|ja|オランダ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – Farmers in {{ill|Kamo District, Aichi|ja|加茂郡}} , {{ill|Mikawa Province|ja|三河国}} , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – The {{ill|Tosa Domain|ja|土佐藩}} arrests {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|ja|武市瑞山}} and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1625]] ) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|ja|吉川広家}} , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province}} (b. [[1561]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|ja|承応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|20|9|22|8|21|10|9|0921}}

[[sn:September 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]] [[zh:九月廿一]] [[en:draft:September 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} , [[1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from {{ill|Kanbun (Japan)|ja|寛文}} to {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} . * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} , [[1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府}} orders two steam-powered warships, {{ill|Kanrin Maru|ja|咸臨丸}} and {{ill|Chōyō Maru|ja|朝陽丸}} , from the {{ill|Kingdom of the Netherlands|ja|オランダ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – Farmers in {{ill|Kamo District, Aichi|ja|加茂郡}} , {{ill|Mikawa Province|ja|三河国}} , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – The {{ill|Tosa Domain|ja|土佐藩}} arrests {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|ja|武市瑞山}} and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1625]] ) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|ja|吉川広家}} , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province}} (b. [[1561]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|ja|承応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|20|9|22|8|21|10|9|0921}}

[[sn:September 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]] [[zh:九月廿一]] [[en:draft:September 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} , [[1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from {{ill|Kanbun (Japan)|ja|寛文}} to {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} . * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} , [[1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府}} orders two steam-powered warships, {{ill|Kanrin Maru|ja|咸臨丸}} and {{ill|Chōyō Maru|ja|朝陽丸}} , from the {{ill|Kingdom of the Netherlands|ja|オランダ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – Farmers in {{ill|Kamo District, Aichi|ja|加茂郡}} , {{ill|Mikawa Province|ja|三河国}} , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – The {{ill|Tosa Domain|ja|土佐藩}} arrests {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|ja|武市瑞山}} and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1625]] ) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|ja|吉川広家}} , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province}} (b. [[1561]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|ja|承応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|20|9|22|8|21|10|9|0921}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} , [[1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from {{ill|Kanbun (Japan)|ja|寛文}} to {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} . * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} , [[1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府}} orders two steam-powered warships, {{ill|Kanrin Maru|ja|咸臨丸}} and {{ill|Chōyō Maru|ja|朝陽丸}} , from the {{ill|Kingdom of the Netherlands|ja|オランダ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – Farmers in {{ill|Kamo District, Aichi|ja|加茂郡}} , {{ill|Mikawa Province|ja|三河国}} , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1863]] ) – The {{ill|Tosa Domain|ja|土佐藩}} arrests {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|ja|武市瑞山}} and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1625]] ) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|ja|吉川広家}} , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province}} (b. [[1561]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|ja|承応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|20|9|22|8|21|10|9|0921}}
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=draft|12=draft}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from {{ill|Kanbun (Japan)|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft}} . * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府|12=draft|12=draft}} orders two steam-powered warships, {{ill|Kanrin Maru|ja|咸臨丸|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Chōyō Maru|ja|朝陽丸|12=draft|12=draft}} , from the {{ill|Kingdom of the Netherlands|ja|オランダ|12=draft|12=draft}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1863]] ) – Farmers in {{ill|Kamo District, Aichi|ja|加茂郡|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Mikawa Province|ja|三河国|12=draft|12=draft}} , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆|12=draft|12=draft}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1863]] ) – The {{ill|Tosa Domain|ja|土佐藩|12=draft|12=draft}} arrests {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|ja|武市瑞山|12=draft|12=draft}} and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=draft|12=draft}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1625]] ) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|ja|吉川広家|12=draft|12=draft}} , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. [[1561]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|ja|承応|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門|12=draft|12=draft}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|20|9|22|8|21|10|9|0921}}
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]]

== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1625]] ) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|ja|吉川広家|12=draft|12=draft}} , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. [[1561]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|ja|承応|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門|12=draft|12=draft}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).
== See Also ==

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿一]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=draft|12=draft}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from {{ill|Kanbun (Japan)|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft}} . * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府|12=draft|12=draft}} orders two steam-powered warships, {{ill|Kanrin Maru|ja|咸臨丸|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Chōyō Maru|ja|朝陽丸|12=draft|12=draft}} , from the {{ill|Kingdom of the Netherlands|ja|オランダ|12=draft|12=draft}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1863]] ) – Farmers in {{ill|Kamo District, Aichi|ja|加茂郡|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Mikawa Province|ja|三河国|12=draft|12=draft}} , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆|12=draft|12=draft}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1863]] ) – The {{ill|Tosa Domain|ja|土佐藩|12=draft|12=draft}} arrests {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|ja|武市瑞山|12=draft|12=draft}} and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=draft|12=draft}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1625]] ) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|ja|吉川広家|12=draft|12=draft}} , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. [[1561]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|ja|承応|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門|12=draft|12=draft}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|20|9|22|8|21|10|9|0921}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月21日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[延宝]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1673年]][[10月30日]]） - 内裏炎上や洪水などにより[[寛文]]から延宝に改元 * [[嘉永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1854年]][[11月11日]]） - 幕府、オランダに蒸気軍艦2隻を発注（[[咸臨丸]]及び[[朝陽丸]]） * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[11月2日]]） - [[三河国]]加茂郡の農民が物価引下げを求めて[[一揆]]。初の「世直し一揆」 * 文久3年（グレゴリオ暦1863年11月2日） - [[土佐藩]]が、[[武市瑞山]]ら[[尊攘派]]を一斉に投獄 *<!-- [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[10月23日]]） - [[川崎大師]]の縁日に際し日本初の[[臨時列車]]を運行 10月21日か? -->
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1625年]][[10月22日]]） - [[吉川広家]]、[[周防国]][[岩国領]]初代領主（* [[1561年]]） * [[承応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1652年]][[10月23日]]） - [[別木庄左衛門]]、[[牢人]]（* 生年不明）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|20|9|22|8|21|10|9|0921}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840212]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 21|qq=September 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 1 of [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 30|October 30]] , [[:en:1673|1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|qq=|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun (Japan)]] to [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] . * Year 7 of [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 11|November 11]] , [[:en:1854|1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shogunate|WD=Q1074150}} orders two steam-powered warships, [[:en:Kanrin Maru|Kanrin Maru]] and [[:en:Japanese warship Chōyō Maru|Chōyō Maru]] , from the [[:en:Netherlands|Kingdom of the Netherlands]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) – Farmers in [[:en:Kamo District, Gifu|Kamo District, Aichi]] , [[:en:Mikawa Province|Mikawa Province]] , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yonaoshi ikki|qq=|1=yonaoshi-ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11362482}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) – The [[:en:Tosa Domain|Tosa Domain]] arrests [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]] and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonjō faction|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 22|October 22]] , [[:en:1625|1625]] ) – [[:en:Kikkawa Hiroie|Kikkawa Hiroie]] , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suō Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō (Edo period)]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 23|October 23]] , [[:en:1652|1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Betsuki Shōzaemon|qq=|1=Betsuki Shōzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11396812}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 1 of [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 30|October 30]] , [[:en:1673|1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|qq=|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun (Japan)]] to [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] . * Year 7 of [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 11|November 11]] , [[:en:1854|1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shogunate|WD=Q1074150}} orders two steam-powered warships, [[:en:Kanrin Maru|Kanrin Maru]] and [[:en:Japanese warship Chōyō Maru|Chōyō Maru]] , from the [[:en:Netherlands|Kingdom of the Netherlands]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) – Farmers in [[:en:Kamo District, Gifu|Kamo District, Aichi]] , [[:en:Mikawa Province|Mikawa Province]] , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yonaoshi ikki|qq=|1=yonaoshi-ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11362482}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) – The [[:en:Tosa Domain|Tosa Domain]] arrests [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]] and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonjō faction|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 22|October 22]] , [[:en:1625|1625]] ) – [[:en:Kikkawa Hiroie|Kikkawa Hiroie]] , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suō Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō (Edo period)]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 23|October 23]] , [[:en:1652|1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Betsuki Shōzaemon|qq=|1=Betsuki Shōzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11396812}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 1 of [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 30|October 30]] , [[:en:1673|1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|qq=|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun (Japan)]] to [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] . * Year 7 of [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 11|November 11]] , [[:en:1854|1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shogunate|WD=Q1074150}} orders two steam-powered warships, [[:en:Kanrin Maru|Kanrin Maru]] and [[:en:Japanese warship Chōyō Maru|Chōyō Maru]] , from the [[:en:Netherlands|Kingdom of the Netherlands]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) – Farmers in [[:en:Kamo District, Gifu|Kamo District, Aichi]] , [[:en:Mikawa Province|Mikawa Province]] , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yonaoshi ikki|qq=|1=yonaoshi-ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11362482}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) – The [[:en:Tosa Domain|Tosa Domain]] arrests [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]] and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonjō faction|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 22|October 22]] , [[:en:1625|1625]] ) – [[:en:Kikkawa Hiroie|Kikkawa Hiroie]] , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suō Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō (Edo period)]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 23|October 23]] , [[:en:1652|1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Betsuki Shōzaemon|qq=|1=Betsuki Shōzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11396812}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿一]][[zh:九月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840212]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 21|qq=September 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 1 of [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 30|October 30]] , [[:en:1673|1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun (Japan)]] to [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] . * Year 7 of [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 11|November 11]] , [[:en:1854|1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shogunate|WD=Q1074150}} orders two steam-powered warships, [[:en:Kanrin Maru|Kanrin Maru]] and [[:en:Japanese warship Chōyō Maru|Chōyō Maru]] , from the [[:en:Netherlands|Kingdom of the Netherlands]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) – Farmers in [[:en:Kamo District, Gifu|Kamo District, Aichi]] , [[:en:Mikawa Province|Mikawa Province]] , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yonaoshi ikki|1=yonaoshi-ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11362482}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) – The [[:en:Tosa Domain|Tosa Domain]] arrests [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]] and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonjō faction|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 1 of [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 30|October 30]] , [[:en:1673|1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun (Japan)]] to [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] . * Year 7 of [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 11|November 11]] , [[:en:1854|1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shogunate|WD=Q1074150}} orders two steam-powered warships, [[:en:Kanrin Maru|Kanrin Maru]] and [[:en:Japanese warship Chōyō Maru|Chōyō Maru]] , from the [[:en:Netherlands|Kingdom of the Netherlands]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) – Farmers in [[:en:Kamo District, Gifu|Kamo District, Aichi]] , [[:en:Mikawa Province|Mikawa Province]] , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yonaoshi ikki|1=yonaoshi-ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11362482}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) – The [[:en:Tosa Domain|Tosa Domain]] arrests [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]] and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonjō faction|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 22|October 22]] , [[:en:1625|1625]] ) – [[:en:Kikkawa Hiroie|Kikkawa Hiroie]] , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suō Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō (Edo period)]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 23|October 23]] , [[:en:1652|1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Betsuki Shōzaemon|1=Betsuki Shōzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11396812}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿一]][[zh:九月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840212]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 21|qq=September 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 1 of [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 30|October 30]] , [[:en:1673|1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun (Japan)]] to [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] . * Year 7 of [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 11|November 11]] , [[:en:1854|1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shogunate|WD=Q1074150}} orders two steam-powered warships, [[:en:Kanrin Maru|Kanrin Maru]] and [[:en:Japanese warship Chōyō Maru|Chōyō Maru]] , from the [[:en:Netherlands|Kingdom of the Netherlands]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) – Farmers in [[:en:Kamo District, Gifu|Kamo District, Aichi]] , [[:en:Mikawa Province|Mikawa Province]] , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yonaoshi ikki|1=yonaoshi-ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11362482}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) – The [[:en:Tosa Domain|Tosa Domain]] arrests [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]] and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonjō faction|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 22|October 22]] , [[:en:1625|1625]] ) – [[:en:Kikkawa Hiroie|Kikkawa Hiroie]] , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suō Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō (Edo period)]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 23|October 23]] , [[:en:1652|1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Betsuki Shōzaemon|1=Betsuki Shōzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11396812}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).

== Deaths == * Year 2 of [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 22|October 22]] , [[:en:1625|1625]] ) – [[:en:Kikkawa Hiroie|Kikkawa Hiroie]] , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suō Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō (Edo period)]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 23|October 23]] , [[:en:1652|1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Betsuki Shōzaemon|1=Betsuki Shōzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11396812}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 21일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月廿一]][[zh:九月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿一]][[zh:九月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840212]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 21|qq=September 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 1 of [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 30|October 30]] , [[:en:1673|1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun (Japan)]] to [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] . * Year 7 of [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 11|November 11]] , [[:en:1854|1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shogunate|WD=Q1074150}} orders two steam-powered warships, [[:en:Kanrin Maru|Kanrin Maru]] and [[:en:Japanese warship Chōyō Maru|Chōyō Maru]] , from the [[:en:Netherlands|Kingdom of the Netherlands]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) – Farmers in [[:en:Kamo District, Gifu|Kamo District, Aichi]] , [[:en:Mikawa Province|Mikawa Province]] , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yonaoshi ikki|1=yonaoshi-ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11362482}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) – The [[:en:Tosa Domain|Tosa Domain]] arrests [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]] and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonjō faction|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 22|October 22]] , [[:en:1625|1625]] ) – [[:en:Kikkawa Hiroie|Kikkawa Hiroie]] , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suō Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō (Edo period)]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 23|October 23]] , [[:en:1652|1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Betsuki Shōzaemon|1=Betsuki Shōzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11396812}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 1 of [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 30|October 30]] , [[:en:1673|1673]] ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun (Japan)]] to [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] . * Year 7 of [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 11|November 11]] , [[:en:1854|1854]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shogunate|WD=Q1074150}} orders two steam-powered warships, [[:en:Kanrin Maru|Kanrin Maru]] and [[:en:Japanese warship Chōyō Maru|Chōyō Maru]] , from the [[:en:Netherlands|Kingdom of the Netherlands]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) – Farmers in [[:en:Kamo District, Gifu|Kamo District, Aichi]] , [[:en:Mikawa Province|Mikawa Province]] , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yonaoshi ikki|1=yonaoshi-ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11362482}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) – The [[:en:Tosa Domain|Tosa Domain]] arrests [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]] and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonjō faction|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 22|October 22]] , [[:en:1625|1625]] ) – [[:en:Kikkawa Hiroie|Kikkawa Hiroie]] , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suō Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō (Edo period)]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 23|October 23]] , [[:en:1652|1652]] ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Betsuki Shōzaemon|1=Betsuki Shōzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11396812}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿一]][[zh:九月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿一]][[zh:九月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿一]][[zh:九月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840212]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 21|qq=September 21}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 30|en|October 30|WD=Q2950|lt=October 30}} , {{ill|1673|en|1673|WD=Q7617|lt=1673}} ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun (Japan)}} to {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō}} . * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11}} , {{ill|1854|en|1854|WD=Q7670|lt=1854}} ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shogunate|WD=Q1074150}} orders two steam-powered warships, {{ill|Kanrin Maru|en|Kanrin Maru|WD=Q2698119|lt=Kanrin Maru}} and {{ill|Japanese warship Chōyō Maru|en|Japanese warship Chōyō Maru|WD=Q6159159|lt=Chōyō Maru}} , from the {{ill|Netherlands|en|Netherlands|WD=Q55|lt=Kingdom of the Netherlands}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|en|November 2|WD=Q2996|lt=November 2}} , {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} ) – Farmers in {{ill|Kamo District, Gifu|en|Kamo District, Gifu|WD=Q1348656|lt=Kamo District, Aichi}} , {{ill|Mikawa Province|en|Mikawa Province|WD=Q768158|lt=Mikawa Province}} , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yonaoshi ikki|1=yonaoshi-ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11362482}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|en|November 2|WD=Q2996|lt=November 2}} , {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} ) – The {{ill|Tosa Domain|en|Tosa Domain|WD=Q1189704|lt=Tosa Domain}} arrests {{ill|Takechi Hanpeita|en|Takechi Hanpeita|WD=Q1074298|lt=Takechi Zuizan}} and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonjō faction|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|en|October 22|WD=Q2957|lt=October 22}} , {{ill|1625|en|1625|WD=Q6826|lt=1625}} ) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|en|Kikkawa Hiroie|WD=Q1049766|lt=Kikkawa Hiroie}} , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suō Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. {{ill|1561|en|1561|WD=Q6618|lt=1561}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|en|Jōō (Edo period)|WD=Q1145081|lt=Jōō (Edo period)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} , {{ill|1652|en|1652|WD=Q6962|lt=1652}} ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Betsuki Shōzaemon|1=Betsuki Shōzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11396812}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|20|9|22|8|21|10|9|0921|qq=}}

wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 30|en|October 30|WD=Q2950|lt=October 30}} , <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿一]][[zh:九月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿一]][[zh:九月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿一]][[zh:九月廿一]]
{{Not to be confused with|September 21|qq=September 21}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 30|en|October 30|WD=Q2950|lt=October 30}} , {{ill|1673|en|1673|WD=Q7617|lt=1673}} ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun (Japan)}} to {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō}} . * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11}} , {{ill|1854|en|1854|WD=Q7670|lt=1854}} ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shogunate|WD=Q1074150}} orders two steam-powered warships, {{ill|Kanrin Maru|en|Kanrin Maru|WD=Q2698119|lt=Kanrin Maru}} and {{ill|Japanese warship Chōyō Maru|en|Japanese warship Chōyō Maru|WD=Q6159159|lt=Chōyō Maru}} , from the {{ill|Netherlands|en|Netherlands|WD=Q55|lt=Kingdom of the Netherlands}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|en|November 2|WD=Q2996|lt=November 2}} , {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} ) – Farmers in {{ill|Kamo District, Gifu|en|Kamo District, Gifu|WD=Q1348656|lt=Kamo District, Aichi}} , {{ill|Mikawa Province|en|Mikawa Province|WD=Q768158|lt=Mikawa Province}} , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yonaoshi ikki|1=yonaoshi-ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11362482}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|en|November 2|WD=Q2996|lt=November 2}} , {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} ) – The {{ill|Tosa Domain|en|Tosa Domain|WD=Q1189704|lt=Tosa Domain}} arrests {{ill|Takechi Hanpeita|en|Takechi Hanpeita|WD=Q1074298|lt=Takechi Zuizan}} and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonjō faction|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|en|October 22|WD=Q2957|lt=October 22}} , {{ill|1625|en|1625|WD=Q6826|lt=1625}} ) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|en|Kikkawa Hiroie|WD=Q1049766|lt=Kikkawa Hiroie}} , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suō Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. {{ill|1561|en|1561|WD=Q6618|lt=1561}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|en|Jōō (Edo period)|WD=Q1145081|lt=Jōō (Edo period)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} , {{ill|1652|en|1652|WD=Q6962|lt=1652}} ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Betsuki Shōzaemon|1=Betsuki Shōzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11396812}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|20|9|22|8|21|10|9|0921|qq=}}
