{{Not to be confused with|September 21|qq=September 21}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō|1=Enpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 30|en|October 30|WD=Q2950|lt=October 30|1=October 30}} , {{ill|1673|en|1673|WD=Q7617|lt=1673|1=1673}} ) – Due to the burning of the {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} , floods, and other disasters, the era name changes from {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun (Japan)|1=Kanbun (era)}} to {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō|1=Enpō}} . * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11|1=November 11}} , {{ill|1854|en|1854|WD=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shogunate|WD=Q1074150}} orders two steam-powered warships, {{ill|Kanrin Maru|en|Kanrin Maru|WD=Q2698119|lt=Kanrin Maru|1=Kanrin Maru}} and {{ill|Japanese warship Chōyō Maru|en|Japanese warship Chōyō Maru|WD=Q6159159|lt=Chōyō Maru|1=Japanese warship Chōyō Maru}} , from the {{ill|Netherlands|en|Netherlands|WD=Q55|lt=Kingdom of the Netherlands|1=Netherlands}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|en|November 2|WD=Q2996|lt=November 2|1=November 2}} , {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} ) – Farmers in {{ill|Kamo District, Gifu|en|Kamo District, Gifu|WD=Q1348656|lt=Kamo District, Aichi|1=Kamo District, Gifu}} , {{ill|Mikawa Province|en|Mikawa Province|WD=Q768158|lt=Mikawa Province|1=Mikawa Province}} , revolt to demand lower commodity prices, marking the first recorded {{ill|Yonaoshi ikki|ja|世直し一揆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yonaoshi ikki|1=yonaoshi-ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11362482}} (social reform riots). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|en|November 2|WD=Q2996|lt=November 2|1=November 2}} , {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} ) – The {{ill|Tosa Domain|en|Tosa Domain|WD=Q1189704|lt=Tosa Domain|1=Tosa Domain}} arrests {{ill|Takechi Hanpeita|en|Takechi Hanpeita|WD=Q1074298|lt=Takechi Zuizan|1=Takechi Hanpeita}} and other {{ill|Sonjō faction|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonjō faction|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} members in a large-scale political crackdown.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|en|October 22|WD=Q2957|lt=October 22|1=October 22}} , {{ill|1625|en|1625|WD=Q6826|lt=1625|1=1625}} ) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|en|Kikkawa Hiroie|WD=Q1049766|lt=Kikkawa Hiroie|1=Kikkawa Hiroie}} , first lord of {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} in {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suō Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. {{ill|1561|en|1561|WD=Q6618|lt=1561|1=1561}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|en|Jōō (Edo period)|WD=Q1145081|lt=Jōō (Edo period)|1=Jōō (Edo period)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23|1=October 23}} , {{ill|1652|en|1652|WD=Q6962|lt=1652|1=1652}} ) – {{ill|Betsuki Shōzaemon|ja|別木庄左衛門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Betsuki Shōzaemon|1=Q11396812|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11396812}} , a masterless samurai (rōnin) (birth year unknown).
